name: profile-suggest detects a compliance signal when a compliance/ folder containing one or more framework yaml files is present
command: mkdir -p repo/compliance && printf 'framework: nist-csf-2\n' > repo/compliance/nist.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'compliance=present' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
